content.text: REVIEW-PASS: 5.1.1(i) — privacy policy claims (camera-only, on-device Vision OCR, no location/analytics/sharing) match code: only AVFoundation+Vision used in ReceiptCaptureView.swift:1-3, on-device OCR at recognizeTotals(), no CoreLocation/tracking SDKs, consistent with description.txt "all on your device."
